title: Caxias do Sul, RS — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Caxias do Sul, RS: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Caxias do Sul is a city in RS with a population of 523,716. The heart of Brazil’s wine country in Serra Gaúcha, famous for its Italian heritage, vineyards, and the Festa da Uva grape festival.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
